message:
feat(web): enhance metrics dashboard with MetricCard and Prometheus parsing

Significantly improves the web dashboard's metrics page with structured
metric display, Prometheus text parsing, and enhanced worker cards.

Metrics page (page.tsx):
- MetricCard component with semantic tones (neutral, positive, warning, danger)
- Prometheus text format parser for daemon /metrics endpoint
- MetricSample type for parsed metric values with labels
- Framer Motion animations for smooth card transitions
- Info tooltips explaining each metric
- Responsive grid layout for metric cards
- Lucide icons for visual metric identification

Worker card enhancements (worker-card.tsx):
- Extended metric display with CPU, memory, disk, network
- SpeedScore integration (total and component breakdowns)
- Status badge with color-coded health indicators
- Slot availability visualization
- Last seen timestamp with relative formatting
- Expandable details section for telemetry

Worker card skeleton (worker-card-skeleton.tsx):
- Loading state placeholder for async data
- Consistent sizing with filled cards

Types (types.ts):
- BudgetStatusResponse for budget endpoint
- WorkerTelemetryView for API response mapping
- SpeedScoreView for dashboard display
- Extended WorkerInfo with telemetry fields

Build history (build-history-table.tsx):
- Minor formatting adjustments

This implements the dashboard components needed for bead y8n
(SpeedScore REST/WebSocket API Endpoints).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
